payload.author: claude
payload.body: FOUNDATION landed + verified vs real Postgres (test/multi-tenant-pg.test.js). A project IS a tenant-scoped board: src/auth_hosted/tenant-board.js (createProjectBoard seeds a workspace.init via uploadEvents; readBoard via snapshotState) + the PG event store. Wired in cloud serve: GET/POST /api/projects, GET /api/board, GET /api/sync/pull, POST /api/sync/push - all tenant-scoped, mounted before the generic file/SQLite handlers. Boot now runs ensureSchema (event tables) + ensureAuthSchema. REMAINING: migrate the granular REST surface (tickets/relations/comments/history endpoints) onto the tenant store - they still fall through to the volume workspace in hosted mode. That migration unblocks the web UI (SCP-191).
